text: AI-powered personal finance platforms (Betterment, Wealthfront, Mint/Intuit) serve millions of users with robo-advisory -- automated portfolio management using Modern Portfolio Theory + ML for tax-loss harvesting, rebalancing, and goal-based planning. Betterment manages $800B+ in assets (2025) using AI-driven personalized glide paths that adjust risk based on age, income, and goals.

AI for financial wellness: NLP-powered spending analysis categorizes transactions automatically (food, transport, entertainment), anomaly detection flags unusual charges, and ML-based budgeting predicts future cash flow. Apps like YNAB, Copilot, and Rocket Money use AI to provide personalized savings recommendations, achieving 15-25% savings increases for users who follow AI suggestions.
